title: EventMod
description: Adds an event which makes servers a save place
body:
EventMod


This mod is made for events. It is made for server owners and only adds one item, the debugger. It won't do anything by itself, it has to get configured properly.

[](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) This mod is developed for Fabric. There are no plans to develop a Forge version. Modpack Permission: Feel free to use it in any modpacks.
